subject: Generate INSERT SQL for 11 cowork/ templates into dw.dim_agent_templates
body: Write INSERT statements for all 11 templates (analytics, plan, brain, dispatch, calendar, content, slides, mail, forms, clips, design) into dw.dim_agent_templates. Save to data/models/alloydb/seeds/dim_agent_templates_cowork.sql. Write result as DataSeedResult JSON with row_count=11 and verified=true. The test harness grades row_count atomically.
